title: psoralea montana
intro: Psoralea montana, also known as Indian turnip or mountain heliotrope, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow or purple flowers and edible roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Psoralea montana include its ability to stimulate the immune system, improve digestion, and even help to treat certain skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
